title: SimpleDailyRewards
body:
# SimpleDailyRewards

A simple reward system designed to be set up as quickly as possible, focusing on delivering rewards efficiently and allowing quick customization by administrators.

## Features

- **Automatic rewards:** Players can receive rewards automatically.
- **Ease of use:** Simple and quick configuration, suitable fot both novice and experienced administrators.
- **Variety of rewards:** Allows delivery of different types of rewards, such as items, experience, and custom commands.
- **Customizable Messages:** All messages can be customized to fit the server's style and theme.
- **SQLite Database:** Utilizes SQLite for efficient and reliable data storage.

![config.yml](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fb0f3352518ea9e9c62c65ba652fd19efbf22bba.png)

## Commands

- **/sdr on** - Enables the reward system.
- **/sdr off** - Disables the reward system.
- **/sdr reload** - Reloads the plugin configuration.
- **/sdr reset** - Resets reward times for all online players.
- **/sdr time [time in seconds]** - Changes the reward interval time.
- **/deliverdailyreward | /ddr | /reward** - Manually deliver the reward to the executting player.

## Permissions

- **sdr.toggle:** Allow enabling or disabling the reward system.
- **sdr.reload:** Allow reloading the plugin configuration.
- **sdr.reset:** Allow resetting the reward time of connected players.
- **sdr.time:** Allow changing the reward interval time.
- **sdr.deliver:** Allow players to receive their reward. (**initially by default**)
